overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a hooded character walking along a foggy mountain trail. The environment features rocky terrain and scattered pine trees with low visibility, transitioning from open wilderness to an enclosed path lined with stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail with scattered boulders and rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path through the foggy wilderness

entered.detail: Large rocky cliff face forming the left boundary of the trail
Irregular cobblestone path winding through the terrain
Large grey boulders scattered along the right side of the path
Tall thin pine trees visible through the fog in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy mountain trail with rocky cliffs on the left and scattered boulders on the right. The path is made of irregular cobblestones and visibility is limited by heavy fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail with wooden signpost and beginning of stone walls

events.description: wooden trail signpost becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, approaching and passing a wooden signpost on the left

entered.detail: Wooden signpost with directional arrows marking the trail
Low stacked stone wall beginning to line the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues with a wooden signpost appearing on the left. Stone walls begin to line the right side of the path as the rocky cliff face moves closer. The fog persists, limiting visibility of the distant pine trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed mountain path with high stone walls flanking both sides

events.description: trail becomes enclosed by stone walls on both sides, creating a corridor effect

agents.ego_description: walking through the walled section of the mountain trail

entered.detail: Stacked stone wall lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path becomes fully enclosed by stone walls on both sides, creating a corridor-like effect. The wooden signpost and rocky cliff are left behind as the character continues through the walled mountain trail.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a foggy mountain trail that gradually transforms from an open wilderness into a narrow, enclosed corridor. It begins with the character walking across irregular cobblestones flanked by rocky cliffs and scattered boulders under a heavy shroud of fog. As the journey continues, a wooden signpost appears on the left while stone walls begin to emerge on the right, bringing the cliff face closer to the path. The scene then shifts as the open terrain vanishes, with the walls extending to both sides to create a confined passage. Finally, the rocky cliffs and signpost are left behind as the character moves deeper into the fully walled mountain trail.
